findings.location: s2 (テストクラスの書き方)
findings.description: The source provides a concrete Java code example illustrating the naming and inheritance rules (package `nablarch.sample.ss21AA`, class `RM21AA100RequestTest extends MessagingReceiveTestSupport`). The knowledge file captures only the textual rules without the code example. Per the checklist, code examples demonstrating correct usage patterns are decision-necessary.

findings.location: s3 (データシートの書き方 — 正常系のケース)
findings.description: The source explicitly states the purpose of the normal case: '電文が正しくデータベースに取り込まれることを確認する'. This purpose statement is omitted from the knowledge file's s3 section.
findings.source_evidence: このケースでは、電文が正しくデータベースに取り込まれることを確認する。
